zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：短期整理偏多
zh.content:
目前XRP/USD价格在1.20488附近波动，短线呈现整理偏多态势。虽然日内上涨1.87%，但价格仍低于20日均线1.21536，显示多头动力尚未完全确立，市场情绪谨慎观望，短期仍有震荡可能。  

技术指标上，MACD为-0.0131，显示下行压力略强，但由于信号线未提供，无法确认趋势反转。RSI缺失使超买超卖状态不明，但结合价格与均线位置，可判断市场仍处于中性偏多格局，需关注成交量变化以捕捉动能增强信号。  

支撑位上，1.1828是近期低点形成的关键支撑，若跌破可能加剧短线回调。阻力位则在1.2071附近，接近日内高点，突破后可能触发进一步反弹。投资者可将这些价位作为风险控制参考，同时注意高波动区间的潜在回撤。  

交易策略上，短线建议逢低轻仓买入，止损设于支撑下方0.5%-1%。若价格企稳突破阻力，则可考虑增加持仓比例，保持灵活仓位管理。总体来看，XRP/USD短期仍偏多，但需谨防回调风险，严格止盈止损。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
XRP/USD is trading at 1.20488 after posting a 1.87% daily gain, indicating modest bullish momentum following a recovery from the 24-hour low of 1.18279. However, the price remains slightly below the 20-period SMA at 1.21536, suggesting the broader short-term trend has not yet fully shifted back to bullish territory. Buyers have regained some control, but a decisive move above the moving average would strengthen the case for continued upside.

The moving average currently acts as a dynamic resistance level, with the market needing sustained buying pressure to break and hold above it. Meanwhile, the MACD reading of -0.01314 remains in negative territory, reflecting lingering bearish momentum from previous sessions. Although the absence of a signal line limits confirmation, the recent price improvement suggests downside momentum may be fading. Traders should watch for further MACD improvement as an early sign of trend stabilization.

Key support is located near 1.1830, corresponding closely to the recent session low. A break below this area could expose XRP to additional selling pressure and potentially trigger a deeper retracement. On the upside, immediate resistance sits around 1.2150–1.2200, where the SMA(20) converges with recent price action. A successful breakout above this zone could open the path toward higher resistance levels near 1.2400 and beyond.

From a trading perspective, cautious bullish positioning may be appropriate while price remains above the 1.1830 support region. Momentum traders could consider waiting for a confirmed close above 1.2150 before initiating new long positions, as this would improve the probability of trend continuation. Conversely, failure to overcome resistance combined with renewed weakness below 1.1830 would favor a defensive stance and increase the risk of further downside movement. Risk management remains essential given cryptocurrency market volatility.
